name: Mimi Benzell
abstract: Miriam Ruth "Mimi" Benzell (April 6, 1918 – December 23, 1970) was an American soprano who performed with the Metropolitan Opera before establishing herself as a Broadway musical theatre, television, and nightclub performer.

concerts.label: Israel Bond Meeting honoring Rebecca Shulman

about_quotes.speaker: Jeff Riddick
about_quotes.evidence: Yeah. This was the band leader, this boy. He was very nice to work with, Eddie O'Neill. He's so young-looking. Mimi Benzel.
